---
title: "Marshall Electrochemical Engineering Lab"
---

# Welcome

Welcome to the Marshall Electrochemical Engineering Lab.

Our research focuses on electrochemical engineering and its application to sustainable technologies, resource recovery, advanced materials, and energy systems.

## Research Themes

### Electrochemical Engineering

Fundamental and applied electrochemical systems.

### Hydrometallurgy and Critical Minerals

Metal extraction, refining, and resource recovery.

### Batteries and Energy Storage

Electrochemical energy conversion and storage technologies.

### Materials and Process Engineering

Advanced materials, process intensification, and industrial applications.

## Latest News

See the [News](news.qmd) page for recent updates.

## Join Us

Information on student projects, collaborations, and opportunities will be posted here.
